5 Best Rust Case Opening Websites

General

Sites where you can open cases are a way to grab yourself some Rust skins. Picture them as fancy loot boxes, and if you're lucky, you could land on a variety of skins. A handful of these sites provide a little more, such as the chance to get free rust skins or go head-to-head with fellow players. But don't forget, this is pretty much a gamble, so only put down money you're alright with losing.
